features: 1.Item Content: TK3400 TK-3400 1T0C0Y0NL0 Compatible Toner Cartridge Black. Our compatible toner cartridge is another choice for the original TK3400 TK-3400 toner cartridge.
2.Compatible with printers: Kyocera ECOSYS PA4500 PA4500x MA4500 MA4500x MA4500fx Laser Printer.
3.Page Yield: 12500 Pages black at 5% coverage, A4 paper, letter. (ISO/IEC standard).

4.ISO Quality Factory: Our toner cartridges are manufactured with new components and are manufactured in the factory that meets ISO 9001 quality management, ISO 14001 environmental management and ROHS environmental standards. We specialize in producing compatible toner cartridges with 20 years of technical experience.
5.Outstanding print quality: we use durable OPC drum，quality toner powder, stable magnetic roller, high-end charge roller, and robust blade to ensure stable and sharp imaging.
